name: FSI Digital - Autonomous AI Sales Agent

parameters.subject: Client referral / overflow capacity
parameters.text:
Hi {{$json['body']['companyName']}} Team,

My name is Ashwani, Founder of FSI Digital (fsidigital.ca). We operate a programmatic SEO engine focused on Canadian government grants.

I am currently generating over 100+ highly targeted, organic inbound leads per month from Canadian business owners looking for government grant consulting services. My firm does not provide consulting services; we are purely a technology and lead-generation company.

We are looking for a single, premium consulting partner to absorb our lead volume. 

Before discussing any pricing or revenue share, I would like to send you my next 5 exclusive leads completely for free so your sales team can verify the quality and intent.

If you are interested in taking 5 free prospect introductions this week, let me know who the best person to speak with is.

Best regards,
Ashwani
Founder, FSI Digital
Email: ashwani@fsidigital.ca
Website: fsidigital.ca

nodes.name: Listen for Replies (Zoho IMAP)
nodes.notes: Triggers when a buyer replies to your email

parameters.systemMessage: You are an elite Sales Development Representative for FSI Digital. Your job is to read replies from Accounting Firms who were offered 5 free leads. If they ask questions, answer professionally indicating we generate organic SBA/Canada grant leads via programmatic SEO. If they haggle on price for future leads, strictly anchor them to $50 per lead or a 10% lifetime revenue share. If they agree, output a JSON confirming the deal is 'Closed-Won'.
parameters.prompt:
Here is the client's reply to our email: {{$json['textPlain']}}

Determine the state of the deal and draft a response or output the final JSON payload to send them the Stripe/PayPal agreement.

nodes.name: Draft PayPal Advance Invoice
nodes.notes: Action triggers only if AI determines deals is Closed-Won
